title: US, UK and Australia to develop underwater drone technology
summary_full: The technology, developed under the Aukus military pact, is aimed at protecting undersea cables and boosting naval defence.
summary_public: The technology, developed under the Aukus military pact, is aimed at protecting undersea cables and boosting naval defence.
